zones.title: Whole-Home Care
zones.description: Dusting of furniture, décor, and accessible surfaces; vacuuming carpets, rugs, and stairs; mopping hard floors with professional products; emptying trash and recycling bins; sanitizing high-touch surfaces such as doorknobs, switches, and remotes.

zones.title: Kitchen Detail
zones.description: Wiping down countertops and backsplash, cleaning and sanitizing sinks and faucets, exterior wipe-down of appliances (fridge, oven, microwave, dishwasher), cabinet fronts and handles wiped, and stove top degreased and polished.

zones.title: Bathroom Refresh
zones.description: Toilets, tubs, showers, and sinks scrubbed and disinfected; soap scum and water stains removed from tiles and glass; mirrors and fixtures polished streak-free; vanities, counters, and cabinet exteriors wiped.

zones.title: Bedrooms & Living Areas
zones.description: Beds made (with optional linen change on request); surfaces, dressers, and nightstands dusted; furniture exteriors wiped and spot-cleaned; living room surfaces, tables, and décor dusted and polished.

zones.title: Rotating Deep-Clean Tasks
zones.description: Different areas are tackled each week, including baseboards and molding, ceiling fans and light fixtures, air vents and return grates, cabinet fronts or interior touch-ups, and window sills and ledges.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every week (best for maintaining a clean, stress-free household).
Duration: 2–4 hours depending on home size and condition.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Legendary Cleaning Rotating System keeps your home fresh and sanitized.
Weekly maintenance combined with rotating deep-cleaning tasks.
Ideal for busy households, families, and pet owners.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Post-construction cleanup.
Carpet shampooing or steam cleaning (available separately).
Wall and ceiling washing.
Full appliance interiors (unless added on).

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Declutter counters and surfaces before your appointment to maximize results.
Use weekly service for upkeep, and pair with seasonal deep cleaning for a like-new feel year-round.
Provide entry instructions if you won’t be home—we’ll handle everything securely.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Cleaning inside oven or refrigerator.
Changing linens.
Shutters and blinds refreshed.

zones.title: Kitchen & Bathrooms
zones.description: Deep cleaning and sanitizing of sinks, tubs, toilets, and showers; countertops disinfected and polished; appliance exteriors cleaned (fridge, oven, microwave, dishwasher); mirrors, fixtures, and faucets polished streak-free.

zones.title: Dusting & Floors
zones.description: Thorough dusting of furniture, surfaces, and décor; edge-to-edge vacuuming of carpets and rugs; mopping of hard-surface floors with professional products; spot-cleaning visible marks on furniture exteriors.

zones.title: Hard-to-Reach Areas
zones.description: Baseboards and molding dusted or wiped; ceiling fans and light fixtures cleaned; air vents and return grates detailed; window sills and ledges refreshed.

zones.title: Bedrooms & Living Areas
zones.description: Beds made (with optional linen change); furniture surfaces wiped and polished; living room tables, décor, and electronics dusted.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Once per month — best for low-traffic homes or as a maintenance reset between seasonal deep cleanings.
Duration: 4–6 hours depending on home size, layout, and condition. Larger homes or those with extra buildup may require additional time.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Monthly reset tackles kitchens, bathrooms, floors, and hard-to-reach areas.
Ideal for singles, couples, or households with low foot traffic.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Post-construction cleanup.
Carpet shampooing or steam cleaning (available separately).
Wall and ceiling washing.
Full appliance interiors unless selected as add-on.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Cleaning inside oven or refrigerator.
Changing linens.
Shutters and blinds refreshed.

zones.title: Surface Cleaning
zones.description: Removal of dirt, dust, and grime buildup on frames, followed by professional washing to prep the aluminum for restoration.

zones.title: Oxidation & Stain Removal
zones.description: Elimination of chalky white oxidation residue; removal of hard water stains, spots, and corrosion marks; with special attention to faded or sun-exposed areas.

zones.title: Polishing & Finish Restoration
zones.description: Gentle polishing revives the original color and sheen, buffing smooths surface imperfections, and the metallic luster is enhanced for curb appeal.

zones.title: Protective Coating Application
zones.description: A professional-grade protective sealant is applied, providing UV and weather resistance while forming a long-lasting barrier to prevent fading or staining.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 3–5 years, depending on environmental exposure (sun, rain, coastal air).
Duration: 3–6 hours per home, depending on number of windows/doors and the level of oxidation or staining.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Cost-effective alternative to replacing anodized frames.
Restores original finish, shine, and color.
Adds long-lasting protection against weather and UV damage.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Structural repairs to bent, broken, or warped frames.
Glass replacement or repair.
Painting or powder coating of frames.
Non-aluminum frame materials.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Regular cleaning helps extend the effects of restoration.
Ideal before listing a home for sale or after years of exposure to harsh weather.
Combine with exterior cleaning services such as window or siding washing for a full refresh.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Combine with full exterior cleaning packages.
Add-on window washing for spotless glass.
Bundle with gutter or siding cleaning for maximum curb appeal.

zones.title: Deep Cleaning Methods
zones.description: Steam Cleaning (Hot Water Extraction) is the most powerful method for deep cleaning, removing embedded dirt, stains, and allergens while refreshing carpet fibers. Low-moisture cleaning is a faster-drying method ideal for certain carpet types or situations requiring quick turnaround.

zones.title: Stain & Odor Treatment
zones.description: Specialized solutions neutralize pet odors and remove stains that target both the surface and underlying padding, with additional treatments available for severe cases.

zones.title: Furniture Handling
zones.description: Light furniture such as chairs, small tables, and end tables is carefully moved to clean beneath. Larger or heavy furniture like beds, sectionals, and entertainment centers is left in place for safety, though it can be pre-moved by the homeowner if desired.

zones.title: Professional Guidance
zones.description: Receive drying-time recommendations tailored to your home’s ventilation, along with post-cleaning care instructions to extend results.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 6–12 months depending on household conditions. Homes with pets, children, or high foot traffic benefit from cleaning every 6 months.
Duration: 2–4 hours for most standard homes. Larger homes or heavily soiled carpets may require more time.
Drying Times: Steam Cleaning 6–12 hours · Low-Moisture Cleaning 2–4 hours.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Safe handling of light furniture.
Professional stain & odor treatments.
Tailored cleaning methods for your carpet type.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Full furniture moving for heavy or oversized items.
Carpet replacement or repair services.
Water damage restoration (separate service).

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Vacuum before your appointment for best results.
Use ceiling fans or HVAC to speed drying.
Schedule cleanings seasonally or before special events for fresher carpets.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Severe stain/odor treatments (on request).
Specialty solutions for pets & allergens.
Protective treatments to extend cleanliness.

zones.title: Hard-to-Reach Areas
zones.description: Cleaning behind accessible furniture, polishing fixtures and trim, and addressing neglected corners and detailed surfaces.

topRight.title: Quick Facts

middleRight.title: Service Highlights

zones.title: Cleanup

faq.question: What’s included in the Refresh Plan?
faq.answer: The Refresh Plan includes monthly maid service to keep your home neat and tidy, plus one annual carpet cleaning, one window washing, and one gutter cleaning. It’s designed for consistent upkeep with the peace of mind that deep-cleaning tasks are automatically covered each year.

faq.question: How does scheduling work for the annual services?
faq.answer: We’ll send you reminders when it’s time for carpet, window, or gutter cleaning. You choose the dates that work best for you, and we handle the scheduling and service so you never have to track them yourself.

faq.question: Can I customize the Refresh Plan?
faq.answer: Yes. While the core services are fixed, you can add extras such as upholstery cleaning, tile cleaning, or exterior surface washing. If you prefer more flexibility in frequency or services, our Signature Plan may be a better fit.

faq.question: Who is the Refresh Plan best for?
faq.answer: The Refresh Plan is ideal for smaller households, empty nesters, or homeowners who want consistent monthly cleaning but don’t need weekly service. It’s also perfect for those who prefer not to manage annual task scheduling.

faq.question: What happens if I miss a scheduled visit?
faq.answer: If you need to reschedule, we’ll work with you to find a new time. We ask for at least 48 hours’ notice to avoid a cancellation fee, but our goal is to keep your plan on track while staying flexible with your schedule.

faq.answer: The Care Plan includes bi-monthly maid service plus one annual carpet cleaning, one window washing, and one gutter cleaning. It ensures consistent upkeep with yearly deep-clean essentials already covered.

faq.question: Can I switch to weekly maid service?
faq.answer: Weekly visits aren’t included in this plan, but you can upgrade to a different plan that offers weekly service. The Care Plan is designed for every-other-week upkeep.

faq.question: How does scheduling work for the annual services?
faq.answer: We’ll send reminders when it’s time for carpet, window, or gutter cleaning. You can choose the date that works best, and we handle the scheduling.

faq.question: Who is the Care Plan best for?
faq.answer: This plan is ideal for families, couples, and busy professionals who want consistent upkeep every two weeks but don’t need weekly service.

faq.question: Can I add extras like upholstery cleaning?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add upholstery, tile, or exterior surface cleaning to your Care Plan for a more complete reset whenever you need it.

faq.question: What’s included in the Pristine Plan?
faq.answer: The Pristine Plan includes weekly maid service plus one annual carpet cleaning, one window washing, and one gutter cleaning. It provides consistent upkeep and annual deep cleaning for a spotless home year-round.

faq.question: Do I get priority scheduling?
faq.answer: Yes. Pristine Plan clients receive priority scheduling during peak seasons such as holidays and spring/fall cleaning periods.

faq.question: Can I add upholstery or tile cleaning?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add upholstery, tile, or exterior surface cleaning as extras to your Pristine Plan for a complete reset when needed.

faq.question: Who is the Pristine Plan best for?
faq.answer: The Pristine Plan is ideal for large households, families, or busy professionals who want their home consistently spotless and free of buildup.

faq.question: How long does each visit take?
faq.answer: Weekly maid visits take about 2–3 hours depending on home size. Annual services take an additional 3–6 hours combined, scheduled separately.

faq.question: What’s included in the Signature Plan?
faq.answer: The Signature Plan includes customizable cleaning options, specialty add-ons, and personalized scheduling. Services cover kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, living spaces, and seasonal or one-off projects.

faq.question: How flexible is the scheduling?
faq.answer: The plan is fully customizable—choose weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, seasonal, or project-based scheduling depending on your lifestyle needs.

faq.question: Can I add specialty services?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add specialty projects such as appliance detailing, tile and grout restoration, upholstery and mattress cleaning, garage organizing, and exterior maintenance like gutter care.

faq.question: Who is the Signature Plan best for?
faq.answer: The Signature Plan is best for homeowners who want total control, concierge-level service, and the ability to adjust services as life changes. It’s ideal for those who prefer consistent quality with flexible scheduling.

faq.question: Do I have a dedicated cleaning team?
faq.answer: Yes. You’ll have one dedicated team for consistency, with a trained backup team available if needed so you’re never left without service.

faq.question: What’s included in the Rotating System?
faq.answer: Every visit includes essential cleaning of bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, and living areas. On rotation, we deep-clean overlooked areas like baseboards, vents, and light fixtures.

faq.question: How flexible is the scheduling?
faq.answer: The Rotating System can be booked weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly depending on your household’s needs.

faq.question: Can I add specialty services?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add extras such as oven cleaning, refrigerator cleaning, shutter and blind care, and linen changes.

faq.question: Who is the Rotating System best for?
faq.answer: It’s ideal for busy households who want consistent cleaning without the stress of last-minute deep cleans. Essential areas are always covered, while deep tasks are rotated in.

faq.question: Do I need Home Detailing too?
faq.answer: We recommend adding Home Detailing once or twice per year for the best results, as it provides a full top-to-bottom deep clean of areas not covered in routine visits.
